query: SELECT id, scanId, hostname, JSON_TYPE(technologies) as techType, JSON_TYPE(postureFindings) as findType, JSON_TYPE(testVectors) as vecType, JSON_TYPE(carverScores) as carverType, JSON_TYPE(dnsRecords) as dnsType FROM discovered_assets ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
